iotwireless.wirelessdevice.otaav10x.AppE.Description: The AppEUI value, with pattern of `[a-fA-F0-9]{16}`.

iotwireless.wirelessdevice.otaav10x.AppK.Description: The AppKey is a secret key, which you should handle in a similar way as you would an application password. You can protect the AppKey value by storing it in the AWS Secrets Manager and use the [secretsmanager](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/dynamic-references.html#dynamic-references-secretsmanager) to reference this value.
